# Terminology {-}

List of terms used throughout.

## Acronyms

```{r tab.cap="Acronyms used in this manual of practice."}
#Create empty table
acronyms <- as.data.frame(matrix(NA, nrow = 0, ncol = 2))
colnames(acronyms) <- c("Acronym", "Description")

#Specify rows of the table
acronyms[1,] <- c("ASCE", "American Society of Civil Engineers")
acronyms[2,] <- c("NBS", "Nature-Based Solutions")

#Send output table rows into a single matrix
rownames(acronyms) <- NULL
knitr::kable(acronyms, align="cl")
```


## Glossary  

Insert terms.
